name: UPWORK, INC
summary: Upwork Inc. operates work marketplace platforms connecting businesses with global talent across freelance, agency, fractional, and payrolled work types. Its core offering is the Upwork Marketplace, a human and AI-powered platform for on-demand skilled talent across 10,000+ skills in 130+ categories. Its subsidiary Lifted provides enterprise contingent workforce solutions including independent contractor, AOR, EOR, staff augmentation, and managed services. With customers in 180+ countries, Upwork enabled $4.0 billion GSV for the year ended December 31, 2025.

products.name: Upwork Marketplace
products.description: Human and AI-powered work marketplace connecting businesses with on-demand skilled independent talent worldwide across 10,000+ skills.

products.name: Lifted
products.description: Enterprise-focused subsidiary providing contingent workforce solutions including sourcing, contracting, compliance, and payment across multiple engagement models.

products.name: Upwork Payroll
products.description: Enables clients to work with talent found on Upwork as employees through third-party staffing providers.

products.name: Uma (Upwork's Mindful AI)
products.description: AI-based solution offered as part of Upwork's platform and workforce solutions portfolio.

products.name: Connects
products.description: Virtual tokens required for talent to bid on projects and purchase ad products on the Upwork Marketplace.

partnerships.description: Upwork partners with third-party staffing firms to employ talent under Upwork Payroll and Managed Services arrangements.
